meanings.definition: throw or toss with a light motion

examples: The ship suddenly lurched to the left
She pitched over the railing of the balcony
He pitched his voice very low

meanings.definition: sell or offer for sale from place to place
throw or hurl from the mound to the batter, as in baseball
hit (a golf ball) in a high arc with a backspin
lead (a card) and establish the trump suit
set the level or character of
examples: She pitched her speech to the teenagers in the audience

meanings.definition: (of sound) set to a certain pitch or key; usually used as a combining form

examples: a pitched rather than a flat roof
